headline: Erskine Rennie
body: ⚪️⚫️🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Excl: Fulham agree deal to sign 16-year-old talented winger Erskine Rennie from Celtic. Rennie picked FFC ahead of a number of English and European clubs and will join on a long-term contract.
raw_text:
⚪️⚫️🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Excl: Fulham agree deal to sign 16-year-old talented winger Erskine Rennie from Celtic.

Rennie picked #FFC ahead of a number of English and European clubs and will join on a long-term contract.
text:

Rennie picked #FFC ahead of a number of English and European clubs and will join on a long-term contract.
